name: The Classic Route: Tehran → Kashan → Isfahan → Yazd → Shiraz
Silk Road: Bazargan → Tabriz → Tehran → Mashhad → Turkmenistan
Caspian Coast: Astara → Rasht → Ramsar → Sari → Gorgan
Persian Gulf: Bandar Abbas → Qeshm → Hormuz
Western Mountains: Kermanshah → Sanandaj → Hamadan → Zanjan
Lut Desert Crossing: Kerman → Shahdad → Nebka → Kerman
Caucasus Circuit: Tabriz → Norduz → Armenia → Georgia → (back to Tabriz)
Alborz Passes: Tehran → Chalus Road → Caspian → Haraz Road → Tehran
